vulnerability.title: Disable graphical user interface
vulnerability.description: By removing the following packages, the system no longer has X Windows installed. xorg-x11-server-Xorg xorg-x11-server-common xorg-x11-server-utils xorg-x11-server-Xwayland If X Windows is not installed then the system cannot boot into graphical user mode. This prevents the system from being accidentally or maliciously booted into a graphical.target mode. To do so, run the following command: sudo dnf remove xorg-x11-server-Xorg xorg-x11-server-common xorg-x11-server-utils xorg-x11-server-Xwayland
vulnerability.recommendation: Remediation script: # remove packages if rpm -q --quiet "xorg-x11-server-Xorg" ; then dnf remove -y --noautoremove "xorg-x11-server-Xorg" fi if rpm -q --quiet "xorg-x11-server-common" ; then dnf remove -y --noautoremove "xorg-x11-server-common" fi if rpm -q --quiet "xorg-x11-server-utils" ; then dnf remove -y --noautoremove "xorg-x11-server-utils" fi if rpm -q --quiet "xorg-x11-server-Xwayland" ; then dnf remove -y --noautoremove "xorg-x11-server-Xwayland" fi
